headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) In The Context Of Other Insurance Brokers Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the insurance brokers stocks, including Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) and its peers.

headline: What Makes Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) a High-Quality Business?
summary: Artisan Partners, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Artisan Mid Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. In Q1 2026, the Artisan Mid Cap Fund reported negative absolute returns but slightly outperformed the Russell Midcap® Growth Index. The market favored lower volatility and income-oriented equities, […]

headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Mays Brown Solicitors
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced that its claims and risk management solutions subsidiary, Gallagher Bassett, has acquired London, UK-based Mays Brown Limited, dba Mays Brown Solicitors. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
